title: Akure, Ondo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Akure, Ondo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Akure is a city in Ondo with a population of 570,000. The capital of Ondo State in southwestern Nigeria, known for its agricultural produce and as a center of Yoruba culture.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
